ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe – Project Alpha
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office and will return on Friday, April 19th. During this period I will have limited access to my email.

For urgent matters related to Project Alpha, please reach out to Sarah Lee at sarah.lee@example.com or call her directly at (555) 123-4567.

I will respond to all other inquiries promptly upon my return.

Best regards,
John Doe
Project Manager

spam.subject: Urgent: Scholarship Offer from XYZ University – Confirmation Required
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! Your application for the XYZ University International Scholarship Program has been shortlisted. We are pleased to offer you a full scholarship covering tuition, accommodation, and a monthly stipend.

To secure your place, please confirm your acceptance by completing the attached verification form. Failure to respond within 48 hours may result in the loss of your scholarship offer.

Click here to review and submit the required documents: <URL>

If you have any questions, contact the Scholarship Office at scholarshipoffice@xyz.edu.

We look forward to welcoming you to the XYZ community.

Sincerely,
Dr. Emily Carter
Director, Scholarship Office
XYZ University
